text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays * Autism Spectrum Disorder 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - African American Community Autism Spectrum Disorder Deafness Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BRIDGEWAY HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers developmental therapies and supports including in-home occupational and speech therapy, social groups, classes, and tutoring. Also offers parent support groups, parent and child activity groups, parenting classes, and specialized information and referral. 555 E 15th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Families with children living with autism and related disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 345-0805 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY HOUSE BRIDGEWAY HOUSE
